summary: Iteration 28 - Music Library Feature Testing. All backend APIs PASSED (6/6 tests). Frontend had CRITICAL JavaScript bug (t is not a function) which was FIXED. After fix, all UI features work: Music Library (5/5 tracks), Contact Data (4/4 fields), Play/Pause buttons, Track selection.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: TypeError: t is not a function - useTranslation() hook was only called in main PipelineView component but t() was used in helper components (ImageLightbox, StepCard, CopyApproval, CompletedSummary, HistoryCard)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added const { t } = useTranslation() to each helper component that uses t()
bugs_fixed_during_testing.severity: CRITICAL - Blocked entire AI Studio page from rendering

critical_code_review_comments: The useTranslation() fix applied is correct. Each React component that uses t() must have its own useTranslation() call.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features working after bug fix

context_for_next_testing_agent: Music library feature fully working. useTranslation() bug fixed in PipelineView.jsx. All 5 music tracks load from backend API and are displayed in UI with play buttons and selection capability.

music_library_api.details: Returns 5 tracks with id, name, description, duration, preview_url

music_preview_api.details: Streams audio file with Content-Type: audio/mpeg

pipeline_selected_music.details: Accepts selected_music field in request body

music_library_ui.details: All 5 tracks visible with play buttons in AI Studio form

music_play_button.details: Play/pause buttons work for audio preview

music_track_selection.details: Clicking track selects it with gold border and checkmark

contact_data_section.details: 4 fields visible: Phone, Website, Email, Address

ui_language.details: Most labels in English, some section headers use uppercase format (CAMPAIGN NAME vs Campaign Name)
